titleStmt.title: SII 24.566-567: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
Nos. 566 and 567.

summary.p: State that the staffs weighing 1638 varāha gadyāṇa and 1658 varāha godyāṇa and 12 na respectively were the gifts of Kṛishṇājamma when Mīnākshamma, the paṭṭamahishi of Vijayaraṅga Chokkanātha was ruling. The details of date Śviz. aka 1656, Ānanda, Māgha, śu. 2, Tuesday, identical on both the staffs, correspond to 1735 A.D., January 14, Tuesday, f.d.t. ·17.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śālivāhana śakhābdaṁ 1656
Ānaṁdanāma saṁvatsaraṁ māgha śuddha vidiyā
Aṁggārakavāraṁ śrīraṁgganāyakulaku
viśvanāthanāyani śrīvijaya
raṁgga cokkanāthanayyavāri
paṭṭamahiṣulaina śrīmīnākṣaṁmma
rāru rājyabhāraṁ śēyucuṁnuṁ
ḍḍagānu kṛṣṇājaṁmma vubhayaṁ .
baṁgāru bettaṁ 1ki va4ga 1638
śālivāhana śakābdaṁ 1656 Ānaṁdanāma
saṁvatsaraṁ mākha śu 2 Aṁgārakavāraṁ
śrīraṁgganāyakuluku viśvanāthanāyani śrī
cokkanāthanāyanayyavāri paṭṭamahiṣulayina
śrīmīnākṣaṁmmagāru rājyabhāraṁ śēyucuṁnnuṁ
ḍḍagā kṛṣṇājaṁmma vubhayaṁ baṁgāru bettaṁ
1kiva4 1658 12na
Digital edition of SII 24.566-567 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
